question_text: A car travels at a constant speed of 15 m/s for 8 seconds. Which of the following best describes the motion of the car during this time?

options.label: A
options.text: The car is accelerating because it is moving

options.label: B
options.text: The car is moving at a constant velocity with no acceleration

options.label: C
options.text: The car must be experiencing an unbalanced force

options.label: D
options.text: The car's speed is increasing at a rate of 15 m/s²

explanation: When an object travels at a constant speed in a straight line, it is moving at constant velocity and has zero acceleration. According to Newton's first law, this means the forces acting on the car are balanced (net force = 0). There is no acceleration occurring.
